items.example: I was so happy when I passed my driving test.
He failed his maths exam and had to retake it.
They got engaged last month and are planning a wedding.
My sister got married in a beautiful church.
She got promoted to senior manager.
He lost his job when the company closed down.
They split up after ten years together.
She got a place at Oxford University.
They finally saved enough to buy a house.
I was offered a job in Germany.
She won some money in a creative writing competition.
I'm afraid I crashed the car this morning.
